dialogue_events.dialogue_text: You wear the metal of a green warrior and are followed by a calot, yet you are of the figure of a red man. In color you are neither green nor red. In the name of the ninth ray, what manner of creature are you?
dialogue_events.source_excerpt: "You wear the metal of a green warrior and are followed by a calot, yet you are of the figure of a red man. In color you are neither green nor red. In the name of the ninth ray, what manner of creature are you?"

dialogue_events.dialogue_text: I am a friend of the red men of Barsoom and I am starving. In the name of humanity open to us,
dialogue_events.source_excerpt: "I am a friend of the red men of Barsoom and I am starving. In the name of humanity open to us," I replied.

dialogue_events.source_excerpt: "Can you see through me?" I exclaimed.

dialogue_events.dialogue_text: But be sure that you do not let them know you are bound for Helium as they are at war with that country. My assistant and I are of no country, we belong to all Barsoom and this talisman which we wear protects us in all lands, even among the green men—though we do not trust ourselves to their hands if we can avoid it,

dialogue_events.dialogue_text: I am unarmed and no enemy,
dialogue_events.source_excerpt: "I am unarmed and no enemy," I hastened to explain. "I have been a prisoner among the green men and am on my way to Zodanga. All I ask is food and rest for myself and my calot and the proper directions for reaching my destination."

dialogue_events.dialogue_text: The chances are small that your tale will be believed until after you have proven your trustworthiness and won friends among the higher nobles of the court. This you can most easily do through military service, as we are a warlike people on Barsoom,
